prestazioni: Engine swap to a **1.8L Twin Spark (AR32301) with forged internals (JE 87mm pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a custom billet crankshaft (Manley 86mm stroke) for a 2.0L stroker build, paired with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (0.64 A/R turbine housing) and **Tial 44mm external wastegate** for 300+ HP on E85 fuel. Supporting mods include a **Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump**, **Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors**, and a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with custom flex-fuel mapping.

Full **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom valved for the Spider’s 105-series rear subframe) with **Eibach 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars**, **SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and differential mounts)**, and **Brembo GT 330mm 2-piece front rotors** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge braided stainless steel brake lines**.

Drivetrain upgrades including a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** (custom 4.10 final drive ratio), **South Bend Stage 3 Clutch** with **Aluminum Flywheel**, and **GKN CV joints** with **polyurethane differential mounts**. Exhaust system features a **Supersprint 4-2-1 header** (1.75" primaries) with a **Scorpion 2.5" cat-back system** and **HJS 200-cell metallic catalytic converter** for Euro 6 compliance.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Spider widebody kit** (custom fiberglass fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with **custom carbon fiber side skirts** and a **custom aluminum rear ducktail spoiler** (modeled after the 1968 Alfa Romeo 33 Stradale). Paint: **PPG Vibrance Collection ‘Rosso Competizione’ with a 3-stage pearl flake finish**.

**OMP Spider-specific bolt-in roll cage** (mild steel, 4-point with harness bar) wrapped in **Sparco 3mm Alcantara**, paired with **Recaro SRD-E fixed-back seats** (custom mounts for the Spider’s floorpan) and **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**. Interior trim includes **carbon fiber door cards, dashboard overlay, and center console** (all custom-molded to Alfa’s original contours).

**Hella Rallye 3000 Super Whites** (7" diameter, custom H4 bulbs) with **custom aluminum buckets** (CNC-machined to fit the Spider’s pop-up mechanism), **Smir Racing LED taillights** (sequential turn signals, integrated reverse lights), and **DTM-style side mirrors** (carbon fiber, heated, with integrated turn signals). Wheels: **OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 17x8 ET25 (front) and 17x9 ET20 (rear)** with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (225/45/17 front, 255/40/17 rear)**.
